Operation 'file.projects.locations.instances.snapshots.create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is extremely vague with no context about what is being snapshotted or why. Missing critical details: (1) what entity is being snapshotted (Filestore instance), (2) what the snapshot is used for (revert capability), (3) input requirements (parent path, snapshot config), (4) output type (Operation resource), (5) side effects (creates persistent snapshot resource). Added domain-appropriate terminology (Filestore, file share, long-running Operation) consistent with API context. Enhanced AI agent interpretability by clarifying when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a snapshot of a Filestore instance's file share. The snapshot captures the current state of the file share and can be used to revert the instance to this point in time. Requires the parent instance resource path and snapshot configuration. Returns a long-running Operation that, when completed, contains the created Snapshot resource with metadata including creation time and source instance reference.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague with no context about what is being snapshotted or why. Missing critical details: (1) what entity is being snapshotted (Filestore instance), (2) what the snapshot is used for (revert capability), (3) input requirements (parent path, snapshot config), (4) output type (Operation resource), (5) side effects (creates persistent snapshot resource). Added domain-appropriate terminology (Filestore, file share, long-running Operation) consistent with API context. Enhanced AI agent interpretability by clarifying when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'file.projects.locations.instances.restore' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what happens to existing data, the asynchronous nature of the operation, and what is returned. Added context about data overwrite, operation type, and completion behavior for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Restores an existing instance's file share from a backup. The capacity of the instance needs to be equal to or larger than the capacity of the backup (and also equal to or larger than the minimum capacity of the tier).
data.summary_suggestion: Restore instance file share from backup
data.description_suggestion: Restores an existing Filestore instance's file share from a specified backup. The target instance capacity must be equal to or larger than the backup capacity and meet the minimum capacity requirement for its tier. This operation overwrites the current file share data with the backup contents. Returns a long-running Operation that completes when the restore is finished.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what happens to existing data, the asynchronous nature of the operation, and what is returned. Added context about data overwrite, operation type, and completion behavior for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Revert an existing instance's file system to a specified snapshot.
data.summary_suggestion: Revert instance file system to snapshot
data.description_suggestion: Reverts an existing Filestore instance's file system to a specified snapshot. This operation restores the file share to the state captured in the snapshot, overwriting any changes made after the snapshot was created. Returns a long-running Operation that completes when the revert is finished.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is too brief and lacks context about data overwrite behavior and asynchronous operation nature. Added clarity about what happens to post-snapshot changes and operation return type for AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Lists all backups in a project for either a specified location or for all locations.
data.description_suggestion: Lists all Filestore backups in a project, optionally filtered by location. Supports pagination through page size and token parameters. Returns a ListBackupsResponse containing backup objects and pagination information.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks context about pagination support and return type. Added clarity about pagination parameters and response structure for better AI agent understanding of filtering and result handling.

message: Operation 'file.projects.locations.operations.cancel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Missing summary. Description is overly verbose and technical. Simplified while retaining critical information about best-effort nature, how to verify cancellation, and expected state transitions. Added reference to CancelOperationRequest schema for input clarity.

data.current_description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of `1`, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.
data.description_suggestion: Requests asynchronous cancellation of a long-running operation. Accepts a CancelOperationRequest. Cancellation is best-effort and not guaranteed to succeed. Returns an empty response. Use Operations.GetOperation to verify cancellation status. On successful cancellation, the operation transitions to CANCELLED state with an error status. If the server doesn't support this method, returns UNIMPLEMENTED error.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is overly verbose and technical. Simplified while retaining critical information about best-effort nature, how to verify cancellation, and expected state transitions. Added reference to CancelOperationRequest schema for input clarity.

data.summary_suggestion: Promote Filestore standby replica to primary
data.description_suggestion: Promotes a Filestore standby instance (replica) to primary status. Accepts a PromoteReplicaRequest. This operation converts the replica into an independent primary instance, enabling read-write access. The original primary instance is no longer synchronized with the promoted replica. Returns an Operation resource representing the promotion process.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks critical context about what promotion means (replica becomes primary), side effects (original primary no longer synced), and what is returned.
